name: Canton Strategic Holdings, Inc.
summary: Overview We are the first publicly traded company to leverage Canton Coin (CC) and support the Canton Network to advance institutional blockchain adoption and the digitization of financial markets. In addition to driving value through activities on the Canton Network, we also operate clinical-stage biotech research and development programs.
